ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "engine_volume" REAL /* Engine volume of the vehicle */,
  "log_price" REAL /* Logged price of the vehicle */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the vehicle */,
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the body type of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine type of the vehicle */,
  "is_registered" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle is registered */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the vehicle */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_type_id") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_body_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_type_id") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the body type */,
  "body_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the body type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "engine_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the engine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "sales_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales staff member who made the sale */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location where the sale was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_staff_id") REFERENCES sales_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales staff member */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the sales staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sales staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the vehicle in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing strategy */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle to which the strategy applies */,
  "price_adjustment" REAL /* Adjustment to the base price of the vehicle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pricing strategy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pricing strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pricing strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_strategies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle targeted by the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the marketing campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_records" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that received the service */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was performed */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the video */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., walkaround, test drive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_videos_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle under warranty */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the warranty */,
  "warranty_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_warranties_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
